== Notes for [[Item:Q3334|Q3334]] ==

Catalogo de pasajeros a Indias durante los siglos XVI, XVII y XVIII, Volume 4,p. 192

https://books.google.se/books?id=9LV6AAAAMAAJ&q=pedro+de+tardajos+isabel+polanco&dq=pedro+de+tardajos+isabel+polanco&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwj6qZ6fudPcAhWlPZoKHTgJDzkQ6AEIKTAA

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAD84EB1EFBBFA9822EF79916CFAA1
geni:6000000080888607979


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
